title: Ceramic Azure Blue
description: Premium ceramic tile with a stunning azure blue glaze finish, perfect for bathroom walls and kitchen backsplashes. The rich tone brings depth and serenity to any space.
creator: Artisan Ceramics Co.

title: Marble Carrara White
description: Elegant Carrara marble tile with distinctive grey veining on a pristine white background. A timeless choice for luxury interiors, ideal for flooring and feature walls.
creator: Italian Stone Masters

title: Terracotta Rustic Red
description: Handcrafted terracotta tiles with a warm rustic red hue, inspired by traditional Mediterranean craftsmanship. Each tile carries subtle natural variations for an authentic look.
creator: Heritage Tile Works

title: Geometric Mosaic Gold
description: Intricate geometric mosaic tiles with gold metallic accents, perfect for creating stunning feature walls and shower niches. A bold statement in any interior.
creator: Luxe Mosaic Studio

title: Slate Dark Charcoal
description: Natural slate tiles in deep charcoal tones, offering a sophisticated industrial aesthetic. Perfect for modern bathrooms, kitchens, and exterior applications.
creator: Stone Age Naturals

title: Encaustic Floral Pattern
description: Victorian-inspired encaustic tiles with delicate floral patterns in deep indigo and cream. A celebration of artisanal tile-making traditions brought into the modern home.
creator: La Maison des Carreaux

title: Penny Round Sage Green
description: Delightful penny round tiles in soft sage green, offering a playful yet sophisticated texture. Ideal for bathroom floors, kitchen splashbacks, and accent walls.
creator: Modern Tile House

title: Travertine Warm Beige
description: Natural travertine tiles with a warm beige palette and characteristic porous surface. This timeless natural stone brings warmth and organic beauty to living spaces.
creator: Roman Stone Gallery

title: Zellige Teal Handmade
description: Authentic Moroccan zellige tiles handmade by master craftsmen in Fez. Each tile's unique imperfections create a rich tapestry of teal hues with extraordinary light-play.
creator: Fez Artisan Collective

title: Wood-Look Walnut Plank
description: Porcelain tiles with a realistic walnut wood grain, combining the warmth of natural wood with the durability and water resistance of porcelain. Perfect for any room.
creator: Nordic Tile Studio

title: Black Hexagon Matte
description: Bold matte black hexagonal tiles that create dramatic geometric patterns. A powerful design choice for statement floors and feature walls in contemporary interiors.
creator: Dark Matter Tiles

title: Subway Metro White
description: Classic bevelled subway tiles in brilliant white with a glossy finish. The most versatile tile in interior design, working beautifully in kitchens, bathrooms, and beyond.
creator: Metro Ceramics
